combat_pillars.unarmed: raw body fighting and mutation-driven offense
combat_pillars.blade: precise close combat with daggers, swords, and light staves
combat_pillars.hafted: heavy close combat with maces, clubs, and axes
combat_pillars.ranged: safer damage with positioning advantage and lower sustained throughput
combat_pillars.spellcasting: mana growth, spell stability, and universal magical fundamentals
combat_pillars.elemental: direct elemental offense and battlefield damage
combat_pillars.arcane: utility, force, movement, wards, and pure magical techniques
combat_pillars.hex: control, disablement, and hostile mental pressure
combat_pillars.necromancy: drain, pain, death, and undead power
combat_pillars.agility: evasion, awareness control, ambush power, and mobility
combat_pillars.tool: wands, thrown tools, and trick items
